title: Migrate docs to .pearls/docs/ and simplify providers config
body:
Atomic migration of this repo to the new `.pearls/docs/` layout with a simplified `madreperla.yaml` providers block. Per the planning doc, this is a single issue — no partial states.

## Scope

### 1. Update `pearls.yaml`

Add a `docs:` section pointing at the new layout:

```yaml
docs:
  planning: .pearls/docs
  epics: .pearls/docs/epics
  ideas: .pearls/docs/ideas
  headaches: .pearls/docs/headaches
  retros: .pearls/docs/retros
```

### 2. Move doc directories

Move existing doc dirs/files from `docs/planning/` to `.pearls/docs/`:

```bash
mkdir -p .pearls/docs/retros
git mv docs/planning/epics .pearls/docs/epics 2>/dev/null || true
git mv docs/planning/ideas .pearls/docs/ideas 2>/dev/null || true
git mv docs/planning/headaches .pearls/docs/headaches 2>/dev/null || true
for f in docs/planning/*.md; do git mv "$f" .pearls/docs/ 2>/dev/null || true; done
touch .pearls/docs/retros/.gitkeep
rmdir docs/planning 2>/dev/null || true
```

- Skip any dirs that don't exist (use `2>/dev/null || true`).
- Standalone `.md` files at the `docs/planning/` root (e.g. `gh-extension.md`) move to the `.pearls/docs/` root.
- Create `.pearls/docs/retros/` with a `.gitkeep` even if no retros exist yet.

### 3. Simplify `madreperla.yaml` providers

Replace the providers block:

```yaml
# before
providers:
  issues:
    name: pearls
    config: "prl configure"
    usage: "prl docs"
  docs:
    name: repo
    usage: "cat docs/README.md"
    planning: docs/planning
    epics: docs/planning/epics
    ideas: docs/planning/ideas
    headaches: docs/planning/headaches
    retro: docs/planning

# after
providers:
  issues: pearls
  docs: pearls
```

The top-level `docs:` key in `madreperla.yaml` (the repo context list — `[AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/]`) stays as-is. It's not the pearls doc structure.

### 4. Regenerate

```bash
prl configure
madp configure --provider claude
```

### 5. Verify

```bash
grep -r '{docs\.' commands/ && echo "FAIL: unresolved vars" || echo "PASS"
```

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `.pearls/docs/` exists with `epics/`, `ideas/`, `headaches/`, `retros/` subdirs (subdirs only required if source existed; `retros/` always exists with `.gitkeep`)
- [ ] No `docs/planning/epics/`, `docs/planning/ideas/`, `docs/planning/headaches/` remain
- [ ] `docs/planning/` is empty or removed — all content moved to `.pearls/docs/`
- [ ] `pearls.yaml` has the new `docs:` section with the `.pearls/docs/...` paths
- [ ] `madreperla.yaml` `providers:` block is simplified to `{issues: pearls, docs: pearls}`
- [ ] Top-level `docs:` repo context list in `madreperla.yaml` is unchanged
- [ ] `prl configure` and `madp configure --provider claude` have been re-run
- [ ] Generated commands under `commands/` contain no unresolved `{docs.*}` literals
